About Me

Passionate About Digital Growth

My name is Abdullah Talib — a passionate Digital Marketer from Bahria Town, Lahore. I scored 89% in Matric and am currently enrolled in ICS Second Year. I have successfully completed a comprehensive Digital Marketing course and now work as a full-service digital marketer.

I provide professional services including Meta Ads, Facebook & Instagram Marketing, Google Ads, Social Media Management, Brand Promotion, Lead Generation, Content Creation, SEO, and Business Growth Strategies.

My journey took me from basic social media knowledge to mastering strategy, creativity, and analysis — using modern platforms and AI tools like ChatGPT to deliver smarter, more effective results for every client.

🎓

ICS Second Year — Currently Enrolled

Combining formal education with hands-on digital marketing practice every single day.

📚

Certified Digital Marketing Course

Completed a full program covering Meta Ads, Google Ads, SEO, and content strategy.

🤖

AI-Powered Marketing with ChatGPT

Using AI tools daily to create smarter ad copies, captions, scripts, and strategies.

What I Offer

My Services

Professional digital marketing services for startups, small businesses & entrepreneurs in Pakistan and globally.

📊

Social Media Management

Full management of Facebook, Instagram, TikTok & LinkedIn — content creation, scheduling, community engagement, and monthly performance reports.

💰

Facebook & Instagram Ads

Strategic Meta ad campaigns with precise audience targeting, compelling creatives, A/B testing, and full performance optimization for maximum ROI.

🎯

Google Ads Campaigns

Search, display and YouTube ad campaigns designed to drive targeted traffic, generate high-quality leads, and grow your business revenue online.

🎬

Video Editing & Reel Creation

Engaging short-form video content for Instagram Reels, TikTok & YouTube Shorts — scripted, edited, and optimized to grab attention and drive engagement.

📈

Lead Generation

Targeted strategies to attract and capture qualified leads through paid ads, organic content, profile optimization, and conversion-focused marketing funnels.

🎨

Brand Promotion & Design

Professional brand promotion including Canva graphic design, social templates, brand kits, and a cohesive visual identity across all your digital platforms.

My Advantage

Why Choose Me?

Working with me means fresh creativity, full dedication, clear communication, and a relentless drive to deliver real results.

01

Creative & Fresh Perspective

I bring new ideas and the latest trends to every project. I stay updated with platform algorithm changes, viral content formats, and emerging marketing strategies to keep your brand ahead of competitors.

02

Consistent & Reliable

I meet deadlines, communicate proactively, and deliver on every promise. Your satisfaction is my reputation — every project receives full dedication regardless of size or budget.

03

AI-Powered Efficiency

I leverage ChatGPT and modern AI tools daily to enhance creativity — producing better ad copies, smarter strategies, and more engaging captions faster than conventional methods.

04

Multi-Platform Expertise

From Facebook and Instagram to TikTok, Google, LinkedIn, and YouTube — I manage your complete brand presence across all major platforms with a unified, cohesive strategy.

05

Affordable & Client-First

I offer competitive rates without compromising quality. My goal is long-term partnerships — your growth becomes my portfolio, my testimonial, and my best marketing asset.

06

Always Growing

Digital marketing evolves daily and so do I. I constantly study new strategies, watch industry leaders, and test new tools so your brand always benefits from the most effective, up-to-date methods.
